song.title: You Are My All in All
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) You are my strength When I am weak You are the treasure that I seek You are my all in all Seeking You as a precious jewel Lord to give up, I'd be a fool You are my all in all
[C] Chorus Jesus, Lamb of God, Worthy is Your name Jesus, Lamb of God, Worthy is Your name
[V2] 2) Taking my sin, my cross, my shame Rising again, I bless Your name You are my all in all When I fall down, You pick me up When I am dry, You fill my cup You are my all in all
[B] Name above all names, Worthy of all praise My heart will sing How great is our God
